caption: A video game depicts an American football game played on a green grass field under bright stadium lights. Players in black and white uniforms face each other across a line of scrimmage. On-screen text at the top indicates it is "4th & 3", "1st" quarter, with "3:07" remaining on the clock and "32" seconds on the play clock, while a score of "0" is shown for both teams. Logos for the Atlanta Falcons and another team are visible. A small inset window in the bottom left shows a fair-skinned man with blond hair wearing a dark blue shirt, watching the game. As the sequence progresses, the play begins; the players clash at the line, and a player in a black jersey carries the ball forward, while a marker circle follows him on the field. The game clock ticks down to "3:06" and then "3:05".
